title: DeadBySkillcheck
description: A lightweight Dead By Daylight inspired quick-time skill check mod
body:
**Keep your game interesting — and even a bit more suspenseful — with this Dead by Daylight-inspired skillcheck mod!**
- Random skill check events
- Freezes you during checks to keep timing fair; failures can punish, successes can buff.
- Fully configurable effects: toggle buffs/debuffs, pick which potion effects apply, tune speed ranges and sequence length.
- Advancements for first trigger, first success, great hits, and flawless streaks.
- Compatible with most horror mods!
  
![Showcase of mod](https://i.imgur.com/YLYJsRs.gif)

Default key: SPACE - Keybind is configurable in settings!

- HUD shows a circular meter with a success ring, a GREAT ring, and a rotating red needle.
- Animated, colorful combo counter appears while you’re on a streak.
